app_release_notes: v0.16.8 - Cleaner Import tab: hides the long workbook maintenance/protection log (just shows the parts you care about - which files parsed, totals, where the backup landed, done). Excel no longer auto-opens after every import - use 'View worksheet in Excel' on the Results or Pocket Card panel when you want to dig in. No more 'workbook contains links to external sources' popup - automatic scrub of zombie references from pre-rename workbooks. New Load now uses the bundled (current) template instead of an older copy that may live in your project folder, and auto-refreshes that local copy. Checkmarks across the app are now visible (orange with a crisp white check, no more barely-there gray). BX-only loads (target groups without chronograph data) now render in the Results panel instead of showing empty.
